places.name: Gettysburg Cyclorama
places.description: A dramatic, 360-degree recreation of Pickett's Charge in the Civil War.

places.name: Civil War Tails at the Homestead Diorama Museum
places.description: A diorama of the Civil War, fought by cats.

places.name: Statue of Sallie Ann Jarrett
places.description: The beloved, war-tested mascot of a Union regiment graces their battlefield monument.

places.name: Gettysburg Dinosaur Tracks
places.description: Long before the Battle of Gettysburg occurred, dinosaurs roamed the area and left their footprints on this bridge.

places.name: Jennie Wade House
places.description: Home of the only civilian casualty at the Battle of Gettysburg.

places.name: Sach’s Bridge
places.description: This covered bridge was used by both Union and Confederate troops during the Battle of Gettysburg in 1863.

places.name: General Sickles's Wound Marker
places.description: This monument marks the beginning journey of a wounded soldier's leg that ended up almost two states away.
